$comment: Single source of truth for the plugin stack. Edit this to add/remove plugins, then re-run bootstrap. 'type' is 'core' (shipped with Obsidian, only toggled on) or 'community' (downloaded from GitHub Releases). IDs and repos were resolved from obsidianmd/obsidian-releases; bootstrap re-resolves community IDs->repos from that registry at runtime and only falls back to the 'repo' field here if resolution fails.

corePlugins.name: Bases
corePlugins.note: Core plugin (ships with Obsidian). Enabled in core-plugins.json; never downloaded.

ai.$comment: Hybrid AI backends. bootstrap templates the chosen backend's host/model into the AI plugins' data.json. defaultProfile is 'local': this work MacBook (and the rig, if the repo is cloned there) uses its OWN Ollama and never touches Tailscale. The iPad/iPhone can't run this script and instead point at the rig over Tailscale (seed them once — see README 'iPad & iPhone'). Only fill backends.rig.host (the rig's Tailscale MagicDNS name or 100.x.y.z IP) when you set up the rig / seed mobile; bootstrap refuses to target the rig while it is the CHANGE-ME placeholder. Override per run with --profile local|rig and --rig-host.
